inputs.label: Length in Feet
inputs.businessContext: The length measured in feet to be converted to yards.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length measured in feet to be converted to yards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yarda dönüştürülecek fit cinsinden ölçülen uzunluk.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gemessene Länge in Fuß, die in Yards umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur mesurée en pieds à convertir en yards.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud medida en pies a convertir a yardas.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional material waste factor as a percentage to account for cutting, damage, or spillage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional material waste factor as a percentage to account for cutting, damage, or spillage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, hasar veya dökülmeyi hesaba katmak için yüzde olarak ek malzeme fire faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialverschnittfaktor in Prozent, um Schnitte, Beschädigungen oder Verschüttungen zu berücksichtigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de perte de matière supplémentaire pour tenir compte des coupes, dommages ou déversements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de desperdicio de material adicional para tener en cuenta cortes, daños o derrames.

inputs.label: Safety Margin Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Safety margin as a percentage to cover measurement errors or unforeseen requirements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety margin as a percentage to cover measurement errors or unforeseen requirements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm hatalarını veya öngörülemeyen gereksinimleri karşılamak için yüzde olarak güvenlik marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheitsmarge in Prozent, um Messfehler oder unvorhergesehene Anforderungen abzudecken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge de sécurité en pourcentage pour couvrir les erreurs de mesure ou les besoins imprévus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de seguridad como porcentaje para cubrir errores de medición o requisitos imprevistos.

inputs.label: Number of Units
inputs.businessContext: The number of identical pieces or sections measured in feet, for total material estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of identical pieces or sections measured in feet, for total material estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam malzeme tahmini için fit cinsinden ölçülen özdeş parça veya bölüm sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Stücke oder Abschnitte, gemessen in Fuß, für die gesamte Materialschätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pièces ou sections identiques mesurées en pieds, pour l'estimation totale de matière.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de piezas o secciones idénticas medidas en pies, para la estimación total de material.

inputs.label: Cost per Yard
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost per yard of material, used to calculate total cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost per yard of material, used to calculate total cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam maliyeti hesaplamak için kullanılan yarda başına birim malzeme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stückkosten pro Yard Material, zur Berechnung der Gesamtkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire par yard de matière, utilisé pour calculer le coût total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste unitario por yarda de material, utilizado para calcular el coste total.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output values.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output values.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı değerlerini yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden der Ausgabewerte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi des valeurs de sortie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear los valores de salida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
